users: Tell me about the Astro Hatchback.

name: kb_qa/carrental-gala-sedan-4-doc

final: From our knowledge base: Arrive in style with this elegant luxury sedan. It boasts a sophisticated design, plush seating, and cutting-edge technology for an unparalleled driving experience. Impress clients or enjoy a special occasion in ultimate comfort.

name: kb_qa/florist-care-and-usage
users: I'm curious about the Care and Usage — any details?
final: To ensure your Bloom & Stem fresh cut bouquets and arrangements maintain their vibrancy, we recommend recutting the stems at a 45-degree angle every two days and replacing the water with a fresh solution. Use the provided flower food packet, mixing it thoroughly as directed.

name: kb_qa/florist-faq
users: Give me the rundown on the FAQ.
final: Here's what we have: What is Bloom & Stem's delivery policy? Bloom & Stem offers same-day delivery for orders placed before 2 PM local time, Monday through Saturday. We deliver within a 25-mile radius of our main studio. Delivery fees are calculated at checkout based on distance. For specific delivery inquiries, please contact our customer service team.

name: policy/returns
users: What's your return policy?
final: Items can be returned within 14 days of delivery for a refund, provided they are in original condition. There is no restocking fee. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days of receiving the return.

name: kb_qa/florist-emerald-embrace-1-doc
users: Tell me about the Emerald Embrace.
final: A lush, low arrangement of deep green foliage, including fern fronds and eucalyptus, interspersed with emerald-green cymbidium orchids. Presented in a sleek, modern dark green ceramic vase.

name: kb_qa/florist-celebration-cascade-26-doc
users: What can you tell me about the Celebration Cascade?
final: A vibrant and festive bouquet designed for joyous celebrations. Features a mix of bold red lilies, orange gerbera daisies, and playful greenery.

name: kb_qa/florist-cheer-up-bunch-20-doc
users: I'm curious about the Cheer Up Bunch — any details?
final: From our knowledge base: A vibrant and uplifting mix of colorful blooms designed to bring a smile. Featuring cheerful gerbera daisies, bright tulips, and cheerful filler flowers.

name: kb_qa/florist-artisan-chocolate-truffles-4-doc
users: Give me the rundown on the Artisan Chocolate Truffles.
final: From our knowledge base: A selection of six handcrafted dark chocolate truffles, infused with subtle flavors like salted caramel and coffee. A decadent treat to complement any floral gift.

name: policy/returns
users: What's your return policy?
final: Items can be returned within 14 days of delivery for a refund, provided they are in original condition. There is no restocking fee. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days of receiving the return.
